name: OpenClaw-LiveAsset
description: OpenClaw-LiveAsset — transforms user corrections into executable behavioral rules for LLM agents. Matching → Input Control → Process Control (state machine) → Output Control → Validation/Update.

assetsDir.label: Assets Directory
assetsDir.help: Path to JSON asset files. Defaults to $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/live-assets.

pythonBin.label: Python Binary
pythonBin.help: Optional Python interpreter for LiveAssets scripts. Falls back to PYTHON_BIN, then python3.
